prompt: Translate all dialogue into Japanese, remake speech bubbles in vertical text layout.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Translate all existing English text in the speech bubbles and caption boxes into Japanese. For each translated Japanese text, render it in a vertical writing layout (top-to-bottom, right-to-left) within its respective bubble/box. Adjust the size and shape of the original speech bubbles and caption boxes to accommodate the vertical text, ensuring they retain their original positions and connections to the speakers.
objects: Man in blue suit and hat
Man in green suit and orange coat
Speech bubbles containing vertical Japanese text
Caption boxes containing vertical Japanese text
Interior setting with doorway (in the left panel)
